tluaColonFunctionNestedChains.tlua(15,7): error TLUA2739: Type '{ b: { f(self: any, x: number): number; g(self: any): number; }; }' is missing the following properties from type '{ f(self: any, x: number): number; g(self: any): number; }': f, g


==== tluaColonFunctionNestedChains.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local a = { b = {} };
    
    // `self` takes the type of the whole chain before the colon, not of its root.
    function a.b:f(x: number): number
      return x;
    end
    
    function a.b:g(): number
      return self.f(self, 1);
    end
    
    local n = a.b.g(a.b);
    
    // The root is not the receiver.
    a.b.f(a, 1);
          ~
!!! error TLUA2739: Type '{ b: { f(self: any, x: number): number; g(self: any): number; }; }' is missing the following properties from type '{ f(self: any, x: number): number; g(self: any): number; }': f, g
